title: Dozer
description: Dynamically lowers frame rate and volume to save resources while running in the background.
body:
# Dozer
Dozer is a lightweight quality‑of‑life Ornithe mod that dynamically lowers frame rate and volume to save resources while running in the background. Supporting 7.10-LTS to 12.2-LTS

## Features
- Sets volume to 5% when unfocused
- Sets frame rate limit to 30 when unfocused
- Sets frame rate limit to 10 when unfocused for 5 minutes

## Found an issue?
Tell me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/ev9eUMXFv6)! 

## Version Support
The mod is marked as supported for 7.10 - 12.2, if you want to try it on versions outside of that range look into [Dependency Overrides](https://wiki.fabricmc.net/tutorial:dependency_overrides).

![Transgender Pride Flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1156992fc20560603f6b42c7a37c6cd72724ead.png)
